name: Orange Pecan Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Unroll dough into two long rectangles, overlapping the long sides by half an inch.
3. Firmly press edges and perforations to seal.
4. Press or roll to form a 14x8-inch rectangle.
5. Spread margarine evenly over the dough.
6. In a small bowl, combine brown sugar, chopped pecans, grated orange peel, and cinnamon; sprinkle evenly over the margarine.
7. Starting at the shorter side, roll up in a jellyroll fashion and pinch edges to seal.
8. Cut into 8 slices.
9. Place cut sides down on a large ungreased cookie sheet.
10. Flatten each slice by hand into a 4-inch circle.
11. Sprinkle with about 1/2 teaspoon sugar.
12. Bake for 9-14 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove immediately from the cookie sheet and serve warm or cool.
